title: masdevallia lansbergii
intro: Masdevallia lansbergii is a species of orchid, belonging to the family Orchidaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Masdevallia lansbergii include treating various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Masdevallia lansbergii often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots or leaves, which can be used to create teas or topical applications for medicinal purposes.
